name: Christmas Plum Pudding
recipeIngredient: 3 cups bread crumbs (from good quality white bread, lightly packed)
1/2 cup rum or bourbon, heated slightly before serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the bread crumbs in a large mixing bowl with the raisins, currants, sugar, and spices.
2. Add the melted butter and remaining ingredients except holly, rum/bourbon, and zabaione sauce.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
4. Pack the mixture into the pudding container and cover with wax paper and lid.
5. Place the container on a steaming device and add enough water to reach 1/3 up the sides of the pudding container.
6. Cover the kettle tightly, bring to a simmer, and let steam for at least 6 hours, checking the water level periodically.
7. The pudding is done when it is dark walnut brown in color and firm to the touch.
8. Let the pudding cool, then store in a wine cellar or refrigerator.
9. At least two hours before serving, steam the pudding again.
10. Unmold onto a hot, flameproof serving platter and decorate with holly (if desired).
11. Serve with warmed rum/bourbon and pour over the pudding.
12. Garnish with zabaione sauce.
